title: lasianthus capitatus subsp. capitatus
intro: Lasianthus capitatus subsp. capitatus, also known as the White Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lasianthus capitatus subsp. capitatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
